description_long: This is a medium-height, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural light wood finish. It features four open shelves, each supported by a simple rectangular frame, providing ample space for storage or display. The sides are constructed from solid wood panels, while the back is partially open, allowing visibility and access from the front. The design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible hardware or decorative elements. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy enough to hold books, decor, or other items commonly found in urban environments. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight yet stable, suitable for placement in public or private urban spaces.
description: A light wood, freestanding shelving unit with four open shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is simple, with clean lines and no visible hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full width of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood panels covering the back of the lower shelves and the open upper section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and side panel construction.
